choices.text: SPL token (decimals 0, supply 1, mint auth renounced) + Metaplex Metadata account (name, symbol, uri, royalties, creators) + Master Edition (uniqueness) + token account (owner). Metaplex Token Metadata standard.
Compressed NFTs (cNFTs) via Bubblegum program. Uses Merkle trees → ~$0.0001 per mint vs. $0.01 regular. 1M+ feasible. Tradeoff: traditional wallets need cNFT support; reading requires DAS API.
